titleStmt.title: SII 24.306: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 306. (A.R. No. 59 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: States that the endowment of 80 poṉ made on Vaikāśi 32, Jyēshṭha śu. 5, Friday, Virōdhin corresponding to Śaka 1331, for conducting certain festivals to the god in the name of the king on the day of his natal star Puṇarpūśam in the month of Tai, having been found inadequate, the king increased the endowment by an addition of 55 poṉ on Āshāḍha śu. 1 in the year Vijaya. It was stipulated that there should be no official participation in the management of these festivals, the conduct of which was entrusted to Uttama Nambi. The details of the first date are irregular while those for the second viz. Vijaya, Āshāḍha śu ·1 which is the date of the inscription, may be equated to July 14, 1413 A.D., taking the month as Nija-Āshāḍha, although it cannot be verified for want of the week-day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇṭalīśvaran śrīvīrapūpatiuṭaiyar pṛtivirācci
yam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāptam 1000 3 100 3 10 1- ṉmel cellā
niṉṟa viroti varuṣam vaikācimātam 3 10 2 jeṣṭha cutta pañcamiyum ve
ḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa nāḷ śrīman mahāmaṇṭalīśvaran śrīvīrapūpati Uṭaiyar
perumāḷ śrīraṅganādhanukku kuṭutta paṭṭaiyattukku Etiraṭai . nammuṭaiya
janmanakṣatramāṉa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ śrīraṅgattile nammuṭaiya perāle tirunā
ḷ naṭattuvatukku Inta varuṣam mutal varuṣam varuṣam toṟum tai(m) mātattile pūrvapakṣat
tile Uttiraṭṭāti nāḷ śrīraṅganātaṉukku dvajārohaṇamuṭpaṭa Oṉpatu nāḷt tirunāḷu
m naṭatti Oṉpatānāḷ puṇarpūcattunāḷ nāccimāruṭaṉe śrīraṅganātaṉaiyum tirut terile
Eḻuntaruḷuvittu cittirait tirunāḷp pole deva Uṟsavam Oṉṟukku Oru tāḻvu Aṟa naṭa
ttumpaṭikku śrīraṅgam vitānattil varuṣamtoṟum tiruccirāppaḷḷiccāvaṭiyil karaṇik kar
coṭikku OṭukkiṟaRead ºoṭukkiṉapoṉṉile varākaṉ poṉ 8 10 Intap poṉ Eṇpatum
Inta tirunāḷ veccattukkup potātoḻikaiyil vicaiya varuṣam Āṣāṭa
cutta pāṭṭiya Ārabhyam mutalukku karaṇikkar coṭi nikki nilai poṉ 2 10m Irāyasa
vattaṉai poṉ 3 10- m Oṭavattaṉai poṉ 5— Ākap poṉ 5 10 5 Ākappoṉ
100 3 10 5 Intap poṉ nūṟṟumuppattu Aiñcum dharmmaveccamāka śrīraṅganātaṉ
sannatiyile dhārāpūrvakamākak kuṭuttapaṭi Āle Immati ĀriyiileRead immariyātaiyiletiru
nāḷ naṭattumpaṭikku Uttamanampikku Aruḷic ceytu
Inta stānattukku Araimaṉai Atikāram kaṭaikkūṭṭu veṇṭām
Eṉṟu Irāyasam kuṭutta Aḷavukku Immariyātikku cantiṟātittavaraiyum
naṭakkumpaṭikku kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷḷavum §
Digital edition of SII 24.306 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
